inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Heart rate at rest in beats per minute

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate (can be estimated as 220 - age)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate (can be estimated as 220 - age)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maksimum kalp atış hızı (220 - yaş olarak tahmin edilebilir)

businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima (se puede estimar como 220 - edad)

inputs.label: Minimum Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Lower bound of target heart rate zone as percentage of heart rate reserve

inputs.label: Maximum Intensity
